text.title: BA Strategic Partnership Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end. Each step names inputs, actions, outputs, and optional decision-gates.

step.name: collect-inputs
step.action: Assemble three inputs into one folder.

step.name: draft-stance
step.action: Write stance review using template; name positioning + decision rights + value contract.

step.name: sign-and-publish
step.action: Both parties sign; commit to engagement archive.
